infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Oli uses photos you choose as optional exercise reference images and videos.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Oli uses the camera for optional exercise reference photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Oli uses the microphone when you record exercise reference videos.

plugins.photosPermission: Oli uses photos you choose as optional exercise reference images and videos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Oli uses the camera for optional exercise reference photos and videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Oli uses the microphone when you record exercise reference videos.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Oli reads steps, workouts, resting heart rate, exercise time, and active energy for your workouts overview.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Oli does not write health data.
